title: ItzSboys Tweaks
description: A small resource pack that aims to simplify the hotbar and changes the main menu buttons to look the Essential buttons. Now also includes some slight changes to rails.
body:
# ItzSboys Tweaks

A very small resource pack to made to simplify the hotbar, this includes the experience bar and the bar that shows up when riding a horse, next, the main menu buttons have been changed to match the ones from the Essential mod. For the button textures you can choose between dark and light, if you want the Essential buttons to match with the light buttons, there's a setting in Essential to have their buttons match the vanilla ones. It also changes all the splash texts to be colored white instead of yellow. Finally, it changes the rail textures so that the metal parts now use the cauldron metal colors.

The main purpose of the pack is to make the base Vanilla client a bit cleaner and simplifying some of the Vanilla textures to use less colors.

Feel free to use this resource pack in your modpack.

**This pack doens't require any mods!**
